data.title: Update dso-setup.sh to include merge-state.sh
data.description:
Ensure merge-state.sh is registered in dso-setup.sh installation scope. Consumer hooks source merge-state.sh via HOOK_DIR-relative paths (plugins/dso/hooks/lib/). Scripts source via BASH_SOURCE-relative ../hooks/lib/. merge-to-main.sh sources via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT. Confirm installation manifest includes merge-state.sh for host projects using the pre-commit framework.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption #1 — no conditional logic; installation registration.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] dso-setup.sh specifically references merge-state.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'merge-state.sh' plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
